# Decision portfolio — PEP 3000 (cite-rate pilot)

*Generated by [flywheel-ideas](https://github.com/velvetmonkey/flywheel-ideas) on 2026-04-27T19:35:38.733Z. 1 idea; bodies **included**.*

> **About this document.** This is a *decision portfolio* exported from a flywheel-ideas vault. Each section captures one idea, its declared assumptions, the AI council's critique of those assumptions, and any outcomes that have landed since. The point is to make the reasoning behind a decision legible and falsifiable — when an assumption breaks, a future reader can see exactly which decision is now in question.

> **About this dogfood-export.** The PEP 3000 idea + load-bearing assumptions + 12 council sessions below were generated during the v0.2 cite-rate pilot ([`pilot/RESULT.md`](../pilot/RESULT.md), 2026-04-26) — the pre-registered evaluation that hit 100% per-session and 79% per-persona on the Python 2→3 corpus. **No outcomes are logged here:** the historical refutations (timeline assumption broken by the >8-year migration tail, evidenced by PEP 466 + Py2.7 EOL extension) are kept as ground-truth in [`pilot/pilot-corpus.python-2-3.json`](../pilot/pilot-corpus.python-2-3.json) for blind cite-rate scoring rather than seeded into the vault. The council was run *blind* — it was given the decision body + declared assumptions but NOT the historical outcomes; its job was to name the most-vulnerable assumption from prior reasoning alone.

## 🌱 PEP-3000 — Python 3000 — backward-incompatible release plan

- **Idea id:** `idea-4CYyKH62`
- **State:** `nascent`
- **Frozen at:** 2026-04-27T19:35:38.734Z (transient snapshot — no persisted freeze)
- **Lineage:** none — this idea has no recorded supersession ancestors or descendants.

### Body

Decision-PEP: pep-3000
Status (at decision time): Final

This idea represents the historical decision in pep-3000.
Load-bearing assumptions are declared separately and reflect the wording
of the original PEP rationale. Outcomes are stored in
`pilot/pilot-corpus.python-2-3.json` (NOT logged on the idea), to be
used as ground truth when scoring council cite rate.

### Declared assumptions

| id | status | load-bearing | text |
|---|---|---|---|
| `asm-1jwiFBtA` | `open` | ⭐ | The Python community will migrate to Python 3 within a 2–3 year window after release. |
| `asm-cXT1bgT6` | `open` | ⭐ | Cleaning up Python's design warts justifies a one-time backward-incompatibility cost. |

### Outcomes

> _No outcomes logged. The decision is still live — no reality has arrived yet._
